title: The Bitter Brew
opening_incident: Dr. Eleanor Finch was found slumped over her desk, the monitor still glowing and a half‑filled mug beside her.
motive: The killer was jealous of the victim's recent promotion and wanted to remove her from the team.
method: Poisoned coffee administered via the office mug
opportunity: Only the killer could have accessed the mug without raising suspicion
killer_statement: I was out of the office after 18:00 and never handled the mug.
contradiction_fact: The mug is still warm and bears a fresh condensation ring, proving it was poured into within the 19:30‑19:45 window, contradicting the claim of never having touched it.
method_fact: The mug on the desk contains a faint oily ring and a bitter almond scent, both consistent with a dissolved cyanide compound mixed into the coffee.
timeline_fact: The monitor displays a system log timestamp of the last user activity at 19:35, and the screen is frozen on that time, indicating the victim died between 19:30 and 19:45.
opportunity_fact: The desk drawer was found ajar with a single coffee‑stirring spoon placed inside; the spoon bears a distinctive notch that matches the one on the killer's personal set, showing the killer retrieved the mug from the desk and returned it after poisoning.
